precedence_stages.check: static type, Trait, label, identity and ProjectionGoal formation
explicit dynamic boundary and registry/inspection authority presence
admitted conformance/adapter, normalized key, duplicate and unique route
mode, PlaceId, owner, region, transaction and lifetime
effects, errors, suspension, isolation and cleanup
reflection, serialization, ABI privacy and product-claim boundary

allocation_rule: candidate IDs allocated deterministically in oracle order then explicit subfixture order; no source/import/discovery winner
